pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicit variable declarations
export_result.sh database URL query matching condition
export_result.sh page title substring matching condition
verifier.py checks for pentalobe, tri-point, suction, spudger; page requires 'P2 Pentalobe', 'Tri-point Y000', 'Spudger', 'Suction Handle', and 'Opening Picks'
verifier.py defines safety_keywords including these exact terms to match against the extracted text

privileged_info_summary: The task requires data extraction from a real, live iFixit repair guide for the iPhone 13 Battery Replacement. The expected output file path is '/home/ga/Desktop/iphone13_battery_checklist.txt'. The target guide URL fragment is 'ifixit.com/Guide/iPhone+13+Battery+Replacement', and the page title must contain 'iPhone 13' and 'Battery' as checked by the export script. The verifier checks the generated checklist for critical tools (Pentalobe, Tri-point, Spudger, Suction) and safety keywords (such as puncture, fire, swollen, explode, thermal).
